addrmap dma {
   reg {
      name = "sourceAddress";
      field {
         name = "sourceAddress";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } sourceAddress[31:0];
   } sourceAddress @0x0;
   reg {
      name = "destinationAddress";
      field {
         name = "destinationAddress";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } destinationAddress[31:0];
   } destinationAddress @0x4;
   reg {
      name = "control";
      field {
         name = "control";
         desc = "Size of data transfer";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } length[7:0];
      field {
         name = "control";
         desc = "00=no incrment, 01=Byte, 01=half word, 11=Word incrementing of address";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } sourceIncrement[9:8];
      field {
         name = "control";
         desc = "00=no incrment, 01=Byte, 01=half word, 11=Word incrementing of address";
         sw = rw;
         hw = r;
      } destinationIncrement[11:10];
      field {
         name = "control";
         desc = "Enable transfer";
         sw = w;
         hw = r;
      } \enable [12:12];
   } control @0x8;
};
